commands.review_summary:
The branch exports `resolveIdentityAvatarUrl`, uses it from `agent.identity.get`, adds gateway avatar tests, and also includes cron silent-empty executor/test changes.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +131. Total +144 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current `agent.identity.get` can return `/avatar/<agentId>` for workspace-relative avatars, while the Personal card can render that auth-gated route as an image source.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed to narrow the branch, fix the Personal-card path, resolve conflicts, and supply real behavior proof; automation cannot provide the contributor's setup proof.

target.title: fix: render workspace avatars in identity card
target.body:
﻿Closes #97602

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users configuring a workspace-relative agent avatar would see a broken avatar in the Control UI Personal card because `agent.identity.get` returned an auth-gated `/avatar/<agentId>` URL that a plain image element cannot load with Bearer auth.

## Why This Change Was Made

The identity RPC now reuses the existing workspace-bounded avatar data URI projection before falling back to the Control UI avatar route. The shared projection also preserves the local avatar image-extension policy so unsupported workspace files are not inlined as avatar data.

AI-assisted with Codex.

## User Impact

Control UI can render valid workspace-relative Personal card avatars consistently with the agent list/chat surfaces, while unsupported local avatar files remain blocked and reported through the existing avatar status/reason fields.

## Evidence

- Red/green regression: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts -- -t "returns workspace-relative avatars as data URLs"`
- Security regression: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts -- -t "does not inline unsupported workspace avatar files"`
- Focused identity coverage: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts -- -t "agent.identity.get"`
- Avatar resolver coverage: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts -- -t "avatar"`
- UI render coverage: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/config-quick.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`
- `git diff --check -- src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent.ts src/gateway/session-utils.ts`
- `python .agents\skills\autoreview\scripts\autoreview --mode local` with `PYTHONUTF8=1`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
